scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter text-[#1C3F35]
scales.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#1C3F35]
scales.overline: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#D4AF37] font-semibold

components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#1C3F35] text-[#FAF7F2] px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#142D26] transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide
components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center border border-[#1C3F35]/30 text-[#1C3F35] px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#1C3F35] hover:text-[#FAF7F2] transition-all duration-300
components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 border border-[#1C3F35]/5 flex flex-col h-full
components.input_field: w-full border-b border-[#1C3F35]/20 bg-transparent py-3 text-[#1C3F35] placeholder:text-[#1C3F35]/40 focus:border-[#1C3F35] focus:outline-none transition-colors rounded-none
components.glass_header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF7F2]/80 border-b border-[#1C3F35]/10

header.layout: Sticky top, crystal glassmorphism effect. Flex container with space-between.
header.elements: Left: Text Logo 'Green Tara' in Cormorant Garamond. Center: Desktop nav links (Services, About, FAQ). Right: 'Book Appointment' button.
header.behavior: Transparent when at scroll 0, blurred when scrolling down.

hero.layout: Min-h-[80vh] relative flex items-center justify-center text-center
hero.elements: Background image with bg-black/40 overlay for contrast. Content: Overline ('Green Tara Wellness'), H1 ('Where Healing Meets Tranquility'), Subtitle ('Rejuvenate Your Body, Refresh Your Mind'), Primary CTA.
hero.alignment: Center-aligned content to create a majestic, calming entrance.

about.elements: Left: Large vertically oriented image with rounded-t-full or heavy border-radius. Right: Text block explaining the Green Tara story and philosophy. Soft Sage background section.

services_catalog.layout: CSS Grid (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3 col desktop). gap-8.
services_catalog.elements: Cards for each service (Facial Massage, Steam Bath, Couple Massage, etc.). Card contains: Image (h-48 object-cover), Title, short desc, 'Learn More' trigger opening Shadcn Dialog.
services_catalog.behavior: Hover effects on cards (slight lift, image scale).

booking_system.layout: Multi-step form container centered in a max-w-3xl wrapper. Light shadow, white surface.
booking_system.elements: Step progress indicator (sticky top). Step 1: Service selection (Radio cards). Step 2: Duration selection (Pills). Step 3: Date (Shadcn Calendar) & Time (Scrollable grid). Step 4: Contact details. Final: Confirmation screen.
booking_system.ux_patterns: Inline validation, soft save states, prominent 'Next' and 'Back' buttons.

testimonials.elements: Large gold quotation marks. Serif quote text. Carousel mechanism (e.g., using framer-motion or simple state) for navigating reviews.

faq.elements: Shadcn Accordion. Flush left, border-b only. Clean typography.

footer.elements: Col 1: Brand & Text. Col 2: Operating Hours & Contact (Click-to-call). Col 3: Google Maps embed (rounded-2xl).

floating_whatsapp.elements: Circular button with WhatsApp green (#25D366) or brand green. Lucide MessageCircle icon.

testing_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='book-appointment-btn', data-testid='service-card-deep-tissue').
